summary: PR 2476 linked several previously incomplete or nonmatching objects by updating configure.py object status/flags, moving an .sdata2 split range from hsd_40FF.c to hsd_3B34.c, correcting symbol metadata around exception tables, bytecode strings, psappsrt .bss/.sdata2, and making small source edits in mndiagram.c and psappsrt.c. Bot report records linked code/data and matched data improvements with five new matches, mainly for sysdolphin/baselib/psappsrt sections.

key_files.role: Marks MSL/math_data.c, sysdolphin/baselib/psappsrt.c, hsd_3B27.c, and hsd_3B2B.c as Matching; adds -Cpp_exceptions on to particle.c, psdisp.c, and psappsrt.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:configure.py hunks around MatchingFor object list

key_files.role: Adjusts extab/extabindex local labels, splits former HSD_ByteCode_804074F0 into string labels, shrinks HSD_PSAppSrt_804D10B0 size, and changes psappsrt sdata2 floats from global HSD_PSAppSrt names to local numeric labels.
Moves .sdata2 range 0x804DEB10-0x804DEC00 from sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_40FF.c to sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_3B34.c.
Changes local/global storage declarations for HSD_PSAppSrt_804D7958 and HSD_PSAppSrt_804D10B0 and reorders nearby extern declarations.
Changes a distance conversion divisor literal from float-suffixed 30.4788F to unsuffixed 30.4788 after an explicit f64 cast.

what_changed.text: configure.py promoted MSL/math_data.c, sysdolphin/baselib/psappsrt.c, hsd_3B27.c, and hsd_3B2B.c from NonMatching to Matching.
configure.py added extra_cflags=["-Cpp_exceptions on"] to particle.c, psdisp.c, and psappsrt.c; psdisptev.c already used that flag in the nearby list.
splits.txt reassigned the .sdata2 range 0x804DEB10-0x804DEC00 from hsd_40FF.c to hsd_3B34.c.
symbols.txt replaced several address-style extab/extabindex names with local numeric labels and adjusted bytecode-area .data metadata into multiple string labels.
symbols.txt changed HSD_PSAppSrt_804D10B0 .bss size from 0x30 to 0x2C and made two psappsrt .sdata2 floats local numeric labels instead of global HSD_PSAppSrt names.
psappsrt.c changed HSD_PSAppSrt_804D7958 from extern to static and HSD_PSAppSrt_804D10B0 from extern to a definition.
mndiagram.c changed one literal suffix, using 30.4788 instead of 30.4788F in mnDiagram_ConvertDistanceForDisplay.
Bot report claims +2428 linked-code bytes, +336 matched-data bytes, +1288 linked-data bytes, and five new matches for psappsrt extabindex/.bss/extab/.sbss plus bytecode .data.

smart_moves.text: The PR pairs Matching status flips with symbol and split metadata edits, suggesting object-link completion was handled at the configuration/metadata level rather than by broad source rewrites.
Adding -Cpp_exceptions on to psappsrt and related particle/psdisp objects coincides with extab/extabindex metadata changes and bot-reported psappsrt exception-table matches.
The psappsrt source edits are narrow storage-class/declaration changes aligned with symbol metadata changes for HSD_PSAppSrt_804D10B0 and HSD_PSAppSrt_804D7958.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When linking completed baselib objects that use exception metadata, check configure.py compiler exception flags together with extab/extabindex symbol labels; both may need to move in the same PR for the object to link cleanly.
Section ownership fixes can be required even for a PR titled as object linking; this PR moved a whole .sdata2 range between baselib split entries.
Small literal-type changes can matter for matching: this PR changed 30.4788F to 30.4788 in a calculation already casting distance to f64.

naming_conventions.text: For local hidden extab/extabindex entries, this PR used numeric local labels such as @141/@142 rather than address-derived names like @etb_80005628 or @eti_8000584C.

For data now identified as strings under the former HSD_ByteCode_804074F0 range, this PR used lbl_8040xxxx address-style labels with data:string metadata rather than retaining one broad HSD_ByteCode object.
For psappsrt .sdata2 float constants at 0x804DEA68 and 0x804DEA6C, this PR used local numeric labels @151 and @152 instead of global HSD_PSAppSrt_ address names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use -Cpp_exceptions on for specific baselib objects when exception table sections are part of object linking.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl:bot report psappsrt extab/extabindex new matches
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR does not explain why particle.c and psdisp.c received the flag while remaining NonMatching; treat as PR-local evidence, not a global rule.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjust symbol sizes/scopes and split ownership instead of compensating in C source when object section ownership changes.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The bot report gives aggregate section progress but no objdiff transcript or author rationale.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use exact floating literal type spelling to affect generated code; in this slice, removing the F suffix from 30.4788 was the only source change in mndiagram.c.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No local verification output ties this one-line source change to a named match.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 records linked code 38.81% (+0.06%, +2428 bytes), matched data 38.80% (+0.03%, +336 bytes), linked data 33.14% (+0.11%, +1288 bytes), and five new matches.
No human review comments or PR body rationale are present in the loaded slice.

notes: Changed files and exact diffs are well supported by loaded raw_diff and changed_files.jsonl.
The PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so author intent and reviewer intent are not evidenced.
The bot report provides progress numbers and named new section matches, but no full build log, objdiff output, or per-source-line verification.
Lessons are limited to the observed PR-local pattern and should not be promoted into global standards without additional corroborating PRs or source evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR-local tactic: exception flags plus extab metadata for psappsrt linking
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2476, psappsrt.c was promoted to Matching while receiving -Cpp_exceptions on, and symbols.txt adjusted psappsrt-related extab/extabindex metadata; the bot report lists psappsrt extab and extabindex as new 100% matches.

source_update_candidates.title: psappsrt object linked with C++ exception flag in PR 2476
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2476 changed configure.py so sysdolphin/baselib/psappsrt.c is Matching and uses extra_cflags=["-Cpp_exceptions on"]. The bot report then lists psappsrt extabindex, .bss, extab, and .sbss as new matches.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful path-specific fact for future baselib object-linking work; not broad enough to become a global standard from this PR alone.

source_update_candidates.title: hsd_3B34 owns .sdata2 range 0x804DEB10-0x804DEC00 after PR 2476
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2476 removed .sdata2 start:0x804DEB10 end:0x804DEC00 from sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_40FF.c and added it under sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_3B34.c.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a concrete split ownership change that may be valuable as a path fact, subject to curator validation against current source.

source_update_candidates.title: mndiagram distance conversion used unsuffixed double literal in PR 2476
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2476 changed mnDiagram_ConvertDistanceForDisplay to divide by 30.4788 instead of 30.4788F after casting distance to f64.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential local matching clue for this function; no bot report line directly attributes a match to this change.

rejection_notes: Do not promote '-Cpp_exceptions on for all baselib particle/ps objects' as a global standard; the PR only shows targeted configure.py edits and no rationale.
Do not infer that all HSD_ByteCode-like ranges should be split into lbl_ string symbols; this PR shows one metadata edit only.
Do not claim full object match verification beyond the bot-reported section matches and configure.py Matching status changes; no objdiff log is loaded.
